channel.title: Rabat Review of Books
channel.description: Essays, reviews, fiction, and poetry — from Rabat, for the world.

item.title: Static and Signal
item.dc:creator: Mehdi Khribch
item.description:

item.title: Four Short Poems
item.dc:creator: Mehdi Khribch
item.description:
Spring 2026 · Vol. I · No. 2 Rabat · Paris · London
Subscribe About

I.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. The river at first light — a slow brass bell of water.

Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

II.

Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation. A heron steps once. Then once again. Then is gone.

Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse.

III.

Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident. The small stones remember the shape of the old tide.

item.title: The Last Europeans
item.dc:creator: Mehdi Khribch
item.description:

Subscribe About

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

Sed porttitor, ante non malesuada pulvinar, lacus lacus ornare lorem, id dignissim velit mauris eu est. Praesent id elit quis mi vestibulum malesuada. Cras interdum, velit vel scelerisque convallis, magna lorem tincidunt libero, vitae placerat elit erat ac purus. Mauris ut eros vitae nunc sodales efficitur.

Sed euismod, sapien quis dapibus condimentum, eros urna consectetur nulla, at luctus nisi nunc sed leo. Quisque vitae augue nec libero iaculis facilisis. Donec sed nibh vitae metus volutpat facilisis. Integer tristique, magna non congue malesuada, ligula nulla porta enim, eu luctus urna dolor non mauris. Vivamus sit amet commodo arcu.

item.title: The Bookseller of Rue du Consul
item.dc:creator: Mehdi Khribch
item.description:
Spring 2026 · Vol. I · No. 2 Rabat · Paris · London
Subscribe About

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. The morning light fell across the tiled floor as it always did, and she stood for a moment in the doorway as if remembering some instruction she had been given long ago.

Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

The drawer had not been opened in years. She knew this the way one knows the weather in a house one has lived in — by the stillness of the dust, by the way the wood had swelled in one season and shrunk in another.

Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.

Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. She touched the small brass handle. It was cold, and she was surprised by how much she had expected it to be warm.

Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt explicabo.

Nemo enim ipsam voluptatem quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit aut fugit, sed quia consequuntur magni dolores eos qui ratione voluptatem sequi nesciunt.

Outside, the garden had begun its slow indifferent work of forgetting. A bird landed briefly on the low wall, considered the house, and moved on. Neque porro quisquam est, qui dolorem ipsum quia dolor sit amet.

At vero eos et accusamus et iusto odio dignissimos ducimus qui blanditiis praesentium voluptatum deleniti atque corrupti quos dolores et quas molestias excepturi sint occaecati cupiditate non provident.

item.title: The Sweetness Examined
item.dc:creator: Mehdi Khribch
item.description:

Subscribe About

item.title: The Apricot Trees of Meknès
item.dc:creator: Mehdi Khribch
item.description:
Spring 2026 · Vol. I · No. 2 Rabat · Paris · London
Subscribe About

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. The morning light fell across the tiled floor as it always did, and she stood for a moment in the doorway as if remembering some instruction she had been given long ago.

Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

The drawer had not been opened in years. She knew this the way one knows the weather in a house one has lived in — by the stillness of the dust, by the way the wood had swelled in one season and shrunk in another.

Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. She touched the small brass handle. It was cold, and she was surprised by how much she had expected it to be warm.

Outside, the garden had begun its slow indifferent work of forgetting. A bird landed briefly on the low wall, considered the house, and moved on. Neque porro quisquam est, qui dolorem ipsum quia dolor sit amet.
